<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="es">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>Varolito Licor Artesanal</title>
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Montserrat:wght@200;300;400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet"/>
  <style>
    :root {
      --black: #0a0a0a;
      --black-soft: #111111;
      --gold: #c9a84c;
      --gold-light: #e2c47a;
      --gold-dim: #8a6e30;
      --white: #f5f0e8;
      --white-dim: rgba(245,240,232,0.6);
    }

    *, *::before, *::after { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }

    html { scroll-behavior: smooth; }

    body {
      background: var(--black);
      color: var(--white);
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 300;
      overflow-x: hidden;
      cursor: default;
    }


    .hero-logo {
      width: clamp(180px, 28vw, 320px);
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fade-up 1.2s ease 0.2s forwards;
      filter: drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(201,168,76,0.2));
      margin-bottom: 32px;
    }

    /* ─── GRAIN OVERLAY ─── */
    body::before {
      content: '';
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      background-image: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 256 256' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noise'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.9' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noise)' opacity='0.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
      pointer-events: none;
      z-index: 999;
      opacity: 0.35;
    }

    /* ─── NAV ─── */
    nav {
      position: fixed;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      z-index: 100;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: center;
      padding: 22px 48px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(10,10,10,0.98) 0%, rgba(10,10,10,0) 100%);
    }

    .nav-logo {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 1.1rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.35em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold);
      font-weight: 400;
    }

    .nav-links {
      display: flex;
      gap: 12px;
      align-items: center;
    }

    .nav-btn {
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 300;
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.22em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--white-dim);
      text-decoration: none;
      padding: 8px 18px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
      transition: all 0.35s ease;
      background: transparent;
      cursor: pointer;
      position: relative;
      overflow: hidden;
    }

    .nav-btn::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(201,168,76,0.1), transparent);
      opacity: 0;
      transition: opacity 0.35s ease;
    }

    .nav-btn:hover {
      color: var(--gold-light);
      border-color: var(--gold);
    }

    .nav-btn:hover::before { opacity: 1; }

    .nav-btn.gold {
      color: var(--gold);
      border-color: var(--gold-dim);
    }

    .nav-btn.gold:hover {
      background: var(--gold);
      color: var(--black);
    }

    /* ─── HERO ─── */
    .hero {
      height: 100vh;
      display: flex;
      flex-direction: column;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      text-align: center;
      position: relative;
      padding: 0 24px;
    }

    .hero-bg {
      position: absolute;
      inset: 0;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse 60% 50% at 50% 60%, rgba(201,168,76,0.07) 0%, transparent 70%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 30% at 30% 40%, rgba(201,168,76,0.04) 0%, transparent 60%);
    }

    .hero-line {
      width: 1px;
      height: 80px;
      background: linear-gradient(to bottom, transparent, var(--gold-dim));
      margin: 0 auto 40px;
      animation: grow-line 1.2s ease forwards;
      transform-origin: top;
    }

    @keyframes grow-line {
      from { transform: scaleY(0); opacity: 0; }
      to { transform: scaleY(1); opacity: 1; }
    }

    .hero-eyebrow {
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.45em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold);
      margin-bottom: 20px;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fade-up 1s ease 0.4s forwards;
    }

    .hero-title {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: clamp(3.5rem, 9vw, 7.5rem);
      font-weight: 300;
      line-height: 0.95;
      color: var(--white);
      letter-spacing: 0.05em;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fade-up 1s ease 0.7s forwards;
    }

    .hero-title span {
      color: var(--gold);
      font-style: italic;
    }

    .hero-sub {
      font-size: 0.65rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.4em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--white-dim);
      margin-top: 28px;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fade-up 1s ease 1s forwards;
    }

    .hero-divider {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
      margin-top: 52px;
      opacity: 0;
      animation: fade-up 1s ease 1.2s forwards;
    }

    .hero-divider span {
      height: 1px;
      width: 60px;
      background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, var(--gold-dim));
    }

    .hero-divider span:last-child {
      background: linear-gradient(to left, transparent, var(--gold-dim));
    }

    .hero-divider .diamond {
      width: 6px; height: 6px;
      background: var(--gold);
      transform: rotate(45deg);
    }

    @keyframes fade-up {
      from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(20px); }
      to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); }
    }

    /* ─── MENU MODAL ─── */
    .modal-overlay {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      background: rgba(0,0,0,0.88);
      backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
      z-index: 500;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      opacity: 0;
      pointer-events: none;
      transition: opacity 0.4s ease;
    }

    .modal-overlay.open {
      opacity: 1;
      pointer-events: all;
    }

    .modal {
      background: var(--black-soft);
      border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.25);
      width: min(520px, 92vw);
      padding: 56px 48px 48px;
      position: relative;
      transform: translateY(30px);
      transition: transform 0.4s ease;
    }

    .modal-overlay.open .modal {
      transform: translateY(0);
    }

    .modal::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      height: 2px;
      background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, var(--gold), transparent);
    }

    .modal-close {
      position: absolute;
      top: 20px; right: 24px;
      background: none;
      border: none;
      color: var(--gold-dim);
      font-size: 1.2rem;
      cursor: pointer;
      letter-spacing: 0.1em;
      font-family: 'Montserrat', sans-serif;
      font-weight: 200;
      transition: color 0.3s;
    }

    .modal-close:hover { color: var(--gold); }

    .modal-eyebrow {
      font-size: 0.55rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.45em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--gold);
      margin-bottom: 8px;
      text-align: center;
    }

    .modal-title {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 2.4rem;
      font-weight: 300;
      text-align: center;
      color: var(--white);
      letter-spacing: 0.08em;
      margin-bottom: 40px;
    }

    .menu-divider {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
      margin-bottom: 36px;
    }

    .menu-divider hr {
      flex: 1;
      border: none;
      height: 1px;
      background: rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
    }

    .menu-divider .dot {
      width: 4px; height: 4px;
      background: var(--gold-dim);
      border-radius: 50%;
    }

    .menu-item {
      display: flex;
      justify-content: space-between;
      align-items: baseline;
      padding: 18px 0;
      border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);
      transition: all 0.25s ease;
    }

    .menu-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

    .menu-item:hover .item-name { color: var(--gold-light); }

    .item-name {
      font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif;
      font-size: 1.45rem;
      font-weight: 400;
      color: var(--white);
      letter-spacing: 0.04em;
      transition: color 0.25s;
    }

    .item-dots {
      flex: 1;
      margin: 0 12px;
      border-bottom: 1px dotted rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
      margin-bottom: 4px;
    }

    .item-price {
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.15em;
      color: var(--gold);
      font-weight: 400;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    .menu-note {
      text-align: center;
      font-size: 0.6rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.2em;
      color: var(--white-dim);
      margin-top: 32px;
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }

    /* ─── FOOTER ─── */
    footer {
      position: fixed;
      bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0;
      padding: 16px 48px;
      display: flex;
      justify-content: center;
      align-items: center;
      background: linear-gradient(to top, rgba(10,10,10,0.95) 0%, transparent 100%);
    }

    .footer-text {
      font-size: 0.55rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.3em;
      color: rgba(201,168,76,0.35);
      text-transform: uppercase;
    }
    80% { transform: translateY(10px); opacity: 0; }
    }

    /* ─── CONTACT TOOLTIP ─── */
    .contact-wrapper { position: relative; }

    .contact-tooltip {
      position: absolute;
      top: calc(100% + 10px);
      right: 0;
      background: var(--black-soft);
      border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
      padding: 12px 20px;
      font-size: 0.7rem;
      letter-spacing: 0.15em;
      color: var(--gold-light);
      white-space: nowrap;
      pointer-events: none;
      opacity: 0;
      transform: translateY(-5px);
      transition: all 0.3s ease;
    }

    .contact-wrapper:hover .contact-tooltip,
    .contact-wrapper.active .contact-tooltip {
      opacity: 1;
      transform: translateY(0);
      pointer-events: all;
    }

    .contact-tooltip::before {
      content: '';
      position: absolute;
      top: -5px; right: 20px;
      width: 8px; height: 8px;
      background: var(--black-soft);
      border-left: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
      border-top: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.3);
      transform: rotate(45deg);
    }

    /* ─── MOBILE ─── */
    @media (max-width: 600px) {
      nav { padding: 18px 20px; }
      .nav-logo { font-size: 0.85rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; }
      .nav-btn { padding: 7px 11px; font-size: 0.58rem; letter-spacing: 0.15em; }
      .modal { padding: 44px 28px 36px; }
      .modal-title { font-size: 2rem; }
      footer { padding: 14px 20px; }
    }
  
    /* ─── LOGO CLIP ─── */
    .hero-logo {
      mix-blend-mode: lighten;
    }

    /* ─── PRODUCT IMAGE IN MODAL ─── */
    .modal-product-img {
      width: 100%;
      margin-top: 32px;
      border-radius: 2px;
      display: block;
      object-fit: cover;
      max-height: 260px;
      border: 1px solid rgba(201,168,76,0.15);
      filter: brightness(0.95) saturate(1.05);
    }

  </style>
</head>
<body>

  <!-- NAV -->
  <nav>
    <div class="nav-logo">Varolito</div>
    <div class="nav-links">

      <!-- MENÚ -->
      <button class="nav-btn gold" onclick="openMenu()">Menú</button>

      <!-- INSTAGRAM -->
      <a class="nav-btn"
         href="https://www.instagram.com/varolito12?igsh=MXJ6cGo5OThrMGJhbg=="
         target="_blank" rel="noopener">
        Instagram
      </a>

      <!-- CONTACTO -->
      <div class="contact-wrapper" id="contactWrapper">
        <button class="nav-btn" onclick="toggleContact()">Contacto</button>
        <div class="contact-tooltip">
          📞 &nbsp;7016-0723
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </nav>

  <!-- HERO -->
  <section class="hero">
    <div class="hero-bg"></div>
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="hero-logo" alt="Varolito Logo"/>
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">Hecho con pasión · Costa Rica</p>
    <h1 class="hero-title">Varolito<br/><span>Licor Artesanal</span></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">Sabores únicos &nbsp;·&nbsp; Tradición artesanal</p>
    <div class="hero-divider">
      <span></span>
      <div class="diamond"></div>
      <span></span>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- FOOTER -->
  <footer>
    <p class="footer-text">© 2025 Varolito Licor Artesanal &nbsp;·&nbsp; Hecho con amor</p>
  </footer>

  <!-- MENU MODAL -->
  <div class="modal-overlay" id="menuModal" onclick="closeMenuOutside(event)">
    <div class="modal" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-label="Menú de productos">
      <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeMenu()">✕</button>
      <p class="modal-eyebrow">Nuestros productos</p>
      <h2 class="modal-title">Varolitos</h2>

      <div class="menu-divider">
        <hr/><div class="dot"></div><hr/>
      </div>

      <div class="menu-item">
        <span class="item-name">Crema de Coco</span>
        <div class="item-dots"></div>
        <span class="item-price">₡ 8.500</span>
      </div>
      <div class="menu-item">
        <span class="item-name">Chiliguaro</span>
        <div class="item-dots"></div>
        <span class="item-price">₡ 8.500</span>
      </div>
      <div class="menu-item">
        <span class="item-name">Chilicas</span>
        <div class="item-dots"></div>
        <span class="item-price">₡ 8.000</span>
      </div>

      <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," class="modal-product-img" alt="Productos Varolito"/>
      <p class="menu-note">Elaborados artesanalmente con ingredientes selectos</p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    function openMenu() {
      document.getElementById('menuModal').classList.add('open');
      document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden';
    }
    function closeMenu() {
      document.getElementById('menuModal').classList.remove('open');
      document.body.style.overflow = '';
    }
    function closeMenuOutside(e) {
      if (e.target === document.getElementById('menuModal')) closeMenu();
    }
    document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if (e.key === 'Escape') closeMenu(); });

    function toggleContact() {
      const w = document.getElementById('contactWrapper');
      w.classList.toggle('active');
    }
    document.addEventListener('click', e => {
      const w = document.getElementById('contactWrapper');
      if (!w.contains(e.target)) w.classList.remove('active');
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>
